channel.title: Learning on Nandaja
channel.description: Recent content in Learning on Nandaja

item.title: Life as a Recurser - A fraction of the whole
item.description: I have been living in New York City as one among the incredible Recurse Center community for the past four weeks. Which means one third of my time as a Recurser is behind me and I can’t think of a better occasion to blog about RC. I have been procrastinating blogging for so long, but today is the day I finally do it! What is Recurse Center, you ask? The Recurse Center is a free, self-directed, educational retreat for people who want to get better at programming, whether they’ve been coding for three decades or three months.
